attention3.ptxt: Align the alignment marks and install the solenoid connector so that it is not half-engaged.

s1.ptxt: Check for proper terminal connection to solenoid connector.
Check resistance of each solenoid valve and its circuit.

spec.title: Low brake control solenoid valve resistance:
spec.ptxt: Between low brake control solenoid valve terminal “11” and CVT case: Approx. 5.3 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)

spec.title: High clutch & reverse brake control solenoid valve resistance:
spec.ptxt: Between high clutch & reverse brake control solenoid valve terminal “10” and CVT case: Approx. 5.3 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)

spec.title: TCC solenoid valve resistance:
spec.ptxt: Between TCC solenoid valve terminal “9” and CVT case: Approx. 6.1 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)

spec.title: Line pressure control solenoid valve resistance:
spec.ptxt: Between line pressure control solenoid valve terminal “5” and CVT case: Approx. 5.3 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)

spec.title: Primary pressure control solenoid valve resistance:
spec.ptxt: Between primary pressure control solenoid valve terminal “4” and CVT case: Approx. 5.3 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)
